'''Mon Ubris''' was a floating [[City/Legends|city]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Cala]]. The city was poor and had a reputation for its criminal activity and a large homeless population.<ref name="Strongholds" />

==History==
In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and his partner, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], came to the city in order to find the fabled [[Yavin Vassilika]].
